content:
🔥 headunit-revived | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable users to use Android Auto on a secondary Android device, such as a tablet, by turning it into a headunit receiver.
✨ Key Features: • Turns Android tablets/phones into Android Auto receivers • Supports wired USB connections • Offers wireless connection options (Helper Mode, Wireless Launcher, Native) • Provides an Intent-based connection trigger for automation
📖 Summary: Headunit Revived is an Android application that transforms an Android tablet or phone into an Android Auto receiver. It allows users to mirror their phone's Android Auto interface onto a larger screen, enhancing the in-car entertainment and navigation experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
